calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came as reassigment from the PJ Department for Prove-up Hearing
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Carlito Mandia

Appearances:
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Community Housing Partnership, The property manager
Harold Dees also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff:Community Housing and against the defendant: Anoinette G. Espinoza
as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at: 1000 Market St. #407, San Francisco
plus
rents and per diem damages of $410.92
The plaintiff's waives attorney fees and costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
